text:
Arp entiries are only half deleted after 20 minutes. this causes
	bootpd to fail on the next attempt to use that address.

Fix: 

Havent a clue :-) what with that proxy arp and all im TOTALLY lost.....
How-To-Repeat: 
	arp -a 30 min after connection closed.
